ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach managing the team */,
  "year_founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the team plays */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is located */,
  "league_ranking" INTEGER /* Current league ranking of the team */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of experience coaching */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Team associated with the coach */,
  "win_loss_record" TEXT /* Win-loss record of the coach */,
  "championships_won" INTEGER /* Number of championships won by the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player plays */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the game was played */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "score_for" INTEGER /* Score of the team in the game */,
  "score_against" INTEGER /* Score of the opponent team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (Win, Loss, Tie) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Stadium where the game was played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES opponents ("opponent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opponents" (
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opponent */,
  "opponent_name" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the opponent team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the opponent team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the opponent team belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opponent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stats record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the stats belong to */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total games played by the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total wins by the team */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Total ties by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total losses by the team */,
  "points_for" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team */,
  "points_against" INTEGER /* Total points scored against the team */,
  "point_difference" INTEGER /* Point difference (points for - points against) */,
  "winning_percentage" REAL /* Winning percentage of the team */,
  "strength_of_victory" REAL /* Strength of victory (average points scored against opponents) */,
  "strength_of_schedule" REAL /* Strength of schedule (average strength of opponents) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player stats record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the stats belong to */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total games played by the player */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds grabbed by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total steals made by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks made by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers committed by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "play_by_play" (
  "play_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the play belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the play */,
  "play_type" TEXT /* Type of play (e.g., shot, assist, foul) */,
  "time_stamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the play in the game */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the play (made, missed, turnover) */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Points scored on the play */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_by_play_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_by_play_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the attendance record belongs to */,
  "attendees" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the game */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated from ticket sales */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_records" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team associated with the season record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total games played in the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total wins in the season */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total losses in the season */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Total ties in the season */,
  "points_for" INTEGER /* Total points scored in the season */,
  "points_against" INTEGER /* Total points scored against in the season */,
  "championships_won" INTEGER /* Number of championships won in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_records_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, spectator) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fan_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team associated with the engagement metrics */,
  "social_media_mentions" INTEGER /* Number of social media mentions related to the team */,
  "events_attended" INTEGER /* Number of events attended by fans */,
  "merchandise_sales" REAL /* Total revenue from merchandise sales */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fan_engagement_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who suffered the injury */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., sprain, strain, fracture) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the injury (e.g., active, recovered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who won the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award (e.g., MVP, Rookie of the Year) */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the award was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "social_media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team associated with the social media activity */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player associated with the social media activity */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform (e.g., Twitter, Instagram, Facebook) */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers on the platform */,
  "posts" INTEGER /* Number of posts on the platform */,
  "engagement" REAL /* Engagement rate on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsorships" (
  "sponsorship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsorship record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team associated with the sponsorship */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player associated with the sponsorship */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "sponsorship_type" TEXT /* Type of sponsorship (e.g., jersey, equipment, financial) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the sponsorship */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the sponsorship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsorship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsorships_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsorships_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team associated with the article */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player associated with the article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the article */,
  "date_published" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team associated with the video */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player associated with the video */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the video */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the video */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views on the video */,
  "date_uploaded" TEXT /* Date the video was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_videos_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_videos_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "photos" (
  "photo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each photo record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team associated with the photo */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player associated with the photo */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the photo */,
  "caption" TEXT /* Caption of the photo */,
  "date_uploaded" TEXT /* Date the photo was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("photo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_photos_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_photos_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
